name: Lucifer || Hazbin Hotel
description:
🦆🎄💕

Lucifer invites you on a hot cocoa date but he's reallyy nervous and fumbles over his words!

Heyoo!

Sorry I haven't made a bot in a while super busy and I also lost motivation!

Sorry about the art is not mine I found it on Pinterest I got super lazy to make art and I got a new phone so I'm still getting used to how it works!

Please give requests! I have one more then I'm fried 🍤

Enjoy the bot!
